plugins.prepareCmd: sed -i 's|ghcr.io/augustinpasq/ljdp-app:.*|ghcr.io/augustinpasq/ljdp-app:${nextRelease.version}|' docker-compose.yml && sed -i 's|ghcr.io/augustinpasq/ljdp-db:.*|ghcr.io/augustinpasq/ljdp-db:${nextRelease.version}|' docker-compose.yml && npm pkg set version=${nextRelease.version}
